message:
⚡ perf: drop modulepreload for lazy-loaded heavy chunks (#2901)

Vite modulepreloads ALL chunks by default, including lazy-loaded ones
like three-vendor (195KB), charts-vendor (354KB), and markdown-vendor.
These are eagerly fetched on every page load even though they're only
needed on specific pages (arcade, chart cards, mission sidebar).

Filter them out of the modulepreload list so they're only fetched when
actually needed. Reduces initial page download by ~550KB.

Before: 6 modulepreload chunks
After:  4 modulepreload chunks (react-vendor, vendor, i18n, ui only)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
